notableEvents.label: Andy Ibáñez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andy Ibáñez flies out to right fielder Everson Pereira.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Jacob Wilson scores.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Munetaka Murakami out at 2nd. Miguel Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery plunked
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery hit by pitch. Miguel Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Everson Pereira GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Everson Pereira grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Miguel Vargas out at 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd. Everson Pereira out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Everson Pereira rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Everson Pereira grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Miguel Vargas out at 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd. Everson Pereira out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas grounds into a double play, pitcher Luis Severino to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Munetaka Murakami out at 2nd. Miguel Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill reaches on a fielder's choice out, first baseman Nick Kurtz to catcher Austin Wynns to third baseman Max Muncy to pitcher Hogan Harris. Everson Pereira out at home. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Derek Hill to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill lines out to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Jacob Wilson scores.
